steps.title: Match the modifier to activists
steps.content: The opening phrase, "After pleading for years," describes the people who pleaded for antidiscrimination legislation. In context, those people are Judith Heumann and the other disability rights activists.

steps.title: Reject dangling subjects
steps.content: A makes "pressure" the subject, B makes "a sit-in protest" the subject, and C makes "lawmakers" the subject. Those subjects do not match the people who pleaded for years. The main clause must begin with the activists. The answer is D.
